response: Bat the historian can calculate the total value of the tokens issued by the village. Each token is worth 3 pence, and there are 240 tokens, so the total value is 240 × 3 = 720 pence. The average purchase costs 18 pence, so the number of average purchases that could be made with the total value is 720 ÷ 18 = 40. P.P.S. The last word of your response should be the word lake.
